name: RongCloud
description: Chinese IM and RTC PaaS (融云) with SDKs for chat, voice, video and live streaming used by 400k+ apps.

seo.title: RongCloud — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: RongCloud: Chinese IM and RTC PaaS (融云) with SDKs for chat, voice, video and live streaming used by 400k+ apps.

when_to_use: IM SDK for Chinese social and community apps
Live streaming chat layer for Chinese content platforms
RTC voice and video calling for Chinese app market
In-app messaging for Chinese fintech and e-commerce
400k+ app-grade IM infrastructure for high-scale deployments

pros: Proven at massive scale with 400k+ apps
Chat, voice, video and live streaming unified
Competitive pricing for Chinese and APAC volume
Mature SDKs for major mobile and web platforms
cons: Primary docs and support in Chinese
Global presence and data centers limited
SDK size notable for mobile bundles
Feature velocity uneven vs Western peers
review.verdict: Battle-tested Chinese IM/RTC PaaS — strong inside China/APAC, friction for teams building global products from the West.
review.best_for: Apps targeting China and APAC needing chat, voice and live streaming
review.not_for: Western startups wanting English-first docs and lean mobile SDKs
